rulings.Case Title: DIANE TALLEY-EVANS et al VS. HAIGHT STREET MORTGAGE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 8, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANT HSM SF INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained with 10-day leave to amend to address in good faith all issues raised in demurer. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DIANE TALLEY-EVANS et al VS. HAIGHT STREET MORTGAGE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 8, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANT HSM SF INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT Granted with 10-day leave to amend to address in good faith all issues raised in demurer. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VERONICA POLINIO VS. ANGELICA GARDUNO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Pursuant To Ccp 664.6
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 8, 2014, line 2. PLAINTIFF VERONICA POLINIO's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Pursuant To Ccp 664.6 DENIED. Triable issue of fact as to the date for compliance with Paragraph 9 of the stipulation. The Court does not reach the issue of propriety of the Motion for Summary judgment. Even if Summary Judgment motion were available, it is denied due to existence of triable issue of fact. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VALERIE LEE VS. MICHAEL W. SPENCER et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 8, 2014, line 3. DEFENDANT MICHAEL SPENCER's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Re-set/continued for April 30, 2014 per moving party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SIXTH STREET BALDWIN HOUSE HOTEL LLC VS. CHARLES NOLA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 8, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANT CHARLES NOLA's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT GRANTED subject to (1) opposition, (2) Defendant filing answer no later than April 8, 2014 by 4 p.m.; (3) Defendant posting $600 with the Court no later than April 8, 2014 by 4 p.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CENTER VS. KEITH THOMPSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 8, 2014, line 7. DEFENDANT KEITH THOMPSON's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden under CCP 473(b). = (501/REQ)
